creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
Install port on single core (VPS with VDSmanager-FreeBSD jail-like
virtualizaion http://ispsystem.com/en/software/vdsmanager/freebsd_virtualization)


# cat test.php
<?
xhprof_enable();
?>

# php test.php
setaffinity: Resource deadlock avoided
setaffinity: Resource deadlock avoided
Segmentation fault

# sysctl -n kern.smp.cpus
1

Fix: Patch to port

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: For fix this issue we should not use cpu_set_t in xhprof.c
